video_title: Making scented candle. DIY Jesmonite candle container

seconds.vision_desc: a cup with a red liquid pouring out of it
a cup with a red liquid pouring out of it
a cup with a spoon pouring water into it
a cup with a spoon pouring water into it
a spoon pouring liquid into a bowl of food

windows.embed_text: a cup with a red liquid pouring out of it | a cup with a spoon pouring water into it | a white table | a spoon pouring liquid into a bowl of food
windows.embed_text_v2: Pre-heats terrazzo Jesmonite candle jar with red heat tool then pours golden molten wax from stainless steel pouring pitcher around a wooden wick, filling the speckled cup; caption overlay reads pre-heat the jar.
windows.summary_v2: Pre-heats a terrazzo Jesmonite jar with a heat tool, then pours golden molten wax from a stainless pitcher into the jar around a centered wooden wick.

seconds_v2.desc: A small red metal pitcher/blowtorch tip hovers above a speckled terrazzo Jesmonite candle jar with a wooden wick standing upright inside; caption overlay reads 'Pre-heat the jar'.
Same setup, red heat-gun nozzle moves closer over the empty terrazzo jar to warm it; 'Pre-heat the jar' overlay text still visible.
Cut to a stainless steel pouring pitcher tipped over the terrazzo jar, a thin clear stream of melted wax begins to pour down past the wooden wick into the jar.
Continued pour, the molten wax stream falls between the wick and the jar wall, slowly filling the speckled terrazzo cup.
Top-down view as the jar fills with golden-yellow translucent melted wax, wooden wick standing centered.
Same top-down view, pouring pitcher tip still releasing wax into the jar, level rising.
Top-down shot of the terrazzo jar now mostly filled with golden molten wax, pitcher hovering above the centered wooden wick.
Close-up of the stainless steel pour spout tipped low over the jar, last drips of golden wax falling, wick visible in the filled wax surface.

seconds.vision_desc: a spoon pouring liquid into a bowl of food
a candle with a small candle inside
a candle with a small candle inside
a candle with a small candle inside
a bottle of liquid with a red liquid bottle
a candle with a candle holder on it
a candle with a candle holder on it

windows.embed_text: a spoon pouring liquid into a bowl of food | a candle with a small candle inside | a bottle of liquid with a red liquid bottle | a candle with a candle holder on it | a bottle of liquid
windows.embed_text_v2: Finishes pouring wax into terrazzo Jesmonite jar then drops fragrance oil from a red dropper bottle onto cured pale wax surface around centered wooden wick, top-down view on white surface.
windows.summary_v2: Finishes pouring wax then adds fragrance or color drops from a red dropper bottle onto the cured surface of a terrazzo Jesmonite candle with a wooden wick.

tags_v2.action: add fragrance drops to cured candle

seconds_v2.desc: Close-up of a stainless steel pouring pitcher tipped over the terrazzo Jesmonite jar, last drips of golden wax falling onto the filled wax surface around a wooden wick.
Cut to the cured candle: the same speckled terrazzo jar now holds a smooth pale set wax surface with the wooden wick standing centered, top-down view.
A red plastic fragrance/dye dropper bottle enters from upper left, tip hovering over the set candle to add scent or color drops.
Same shot, dropper bottle positioned near the wick, no liquid visible yet on the pale wax.
Closer shot, red dropper tip lowered toward the wax surface near the wooden wick, indicating fragrance/oil being applied to the cured candle top.
Red bottle/dropper hovers above the candle, the metal clamp top visible, preparing to dispense onto the cured wax.
Same composition, the red dropper held steady over the cured pale wax candle with wooden wick centered.
Top-down close-up of the red dropper bottle pressed near the candle surface, single drop forming above the wax to scent/colour the finished top.
